original_query: select 100.00 * sum(case when p_type like 'PROMO%' then l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) else 0 end) / sum(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as promo_revenue from lineitem, part where l_partkey = p_partkey and l_shipdate >= date '1997-10-01' and l_shipdate < date '1997-10-01' + interval '1' month;
rewritten_query:
SELECT 100.00 * 
       SUM(CASE WHEN p_type LIKE 'PROMO%' THEN l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) ELSE 0 END) / 
       SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS promo_revenue
FROM lineitem
INNER JOIN part ON l_partkey = p_partkey
WHERE l_shipdate >= DATE '1997-10-01'
  AND l_shipdate < DATE '1997-10-01' + INTERVAL '1' MONTH;

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Replace implicit join syntax (comma-separated tables) with explicit INNER JOIN syntax for better readability
